title: stachytarpheta cayennensis
intro: Stachytarpheta cayennensis, also known as Cayenne False Hyssop or Lippia, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stachytarpheta cayennensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
